CustomField.description: Mobile Push Apex Calls usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.formula: IF(LimitsMobilePushApexCallsMax__c = 0, "✅ N/A", IF(LimitsMobilePushApexCallsConsumed__c / LimitsMobilePushApexCallsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.MobilePushApexCalls.TransactionRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsMobilePushApexCallsConsumed__c / LimitsMobilePushApexCallsMax__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.MobilePushApexCalls.TransactionAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsMobilePushApexCallsConsumed__c / LimitsMobilePushApexCallsMax__c * 100, 1)) & "% (" & TEXT(LimitsMobilePushApexCallsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(LimitsMobilePushApexCallsMax__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Mobile Push Apex Calls usage with visual indicator. Shows percentage of limit consumed with warning (80%) and danger (90%) thresholds.
CustomField.label: Mobile Push Apex Calls
